  "claims": [
    "AB 1140 will ensure that all children housed in state-licensed facilities will be under the jurisdiction of the California Foster Care Ombudsperson’s Office.",
    "Unaccompanied immigrant children are coming to our country in unprecedented numbers.",
    "Unaccompanied children are entitled to the same rights and grievance procedures as all other children in out-of-home care in California.",
